articles.description:
This was due to a heroic effort by many people at Anthropic working sometimes literally around the clock

It was not at all clear that we'd be able to do this in time, and so proud of everyone who made it happen.

Enjoy Fable.

quoted_tweet.author: claudeai
quoted_tweet.text:
Beginning July 20, Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans, at 50% of limits.

Pro and Team Standard users will continue to have access to Fable via usage credits, and will receive a one-time $100 credit.

Demand for Fable has been challenging to predict, which is why we rolled it out to subscription plans in stages, extending access several times as we secured additional capacity.

articles.title: We're also keeping Claude Code weekly limits 50% higher, now through August 19, for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users.
articles.description: We're also keeping Claude Code weekly limits 50% higher, now through August 19, for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users.

articles.description:
Kimi Business Membership is now available for enterprise orders, offering teams all Kimi Allegretto plan benefits with enterprise-grade support.

Highlights:
> Starts from 5 seats, billed annually
> Supports corporate bank transfer & self-service invoicing
> Supports enterprise-grade data privacy & dedicated technical support

If you need more than 20 seats, you can place multiple orders, or contact the Kimi Business team at sales@moonshot.ai
